tasks.instruction: 去淘宝加购《飞鸟集》，将搜索结果按价格从低到高排序，对比选项，选择最便宜的两件商品，加入购物车，最后停留在购物车页面
rubrics: Searched for '飞鸟集' on Taobao and entered the search results page
Opened the sorting options and selected 'Price from low to high'
Successfully sorted the search results by price from low to high
Identified the first cheapest item and entered its details page
Selected specifications for the first item and added it to the shopping cart
Returned to the search results page and identified the second cheapest item
Entered the details page of the second cheapest item
Selected specifications for the second item and added it to the shopping cart
Navigated to the shopping cart page
human_reference_operations: select '价格从低到高' (Price from low to high)
tap on the first cheapest item to view details
tap on the second cheapest item to view details
tap on the shopping cart icon to navigate to the shopping cart page
